career_objective: As a computer science student with a specialization in Data Science, I'm drawn to environments that foster analytical thinking, collaborative problem-solving, and innovation through AI. With expertise in Python, R, and machine learning, I seek to leverage my skills in data-driven decision-making, and Generative AI. Through mentorship, leadership roles in technical communities, and hands-on projects, I've developed strategic thinking, pattern recognition, and effective communication skills. I'm excited to join an organization where I can apply my skills, share knowledge, and contribute to meaningful projects that drive real-world impact.
